sections.paragraph: (for עֲוַי i.q. עִי, “a heap of ruins”), with the art. הָעַי [Ai, Hai], pr.n. of a royal city of the Canaanites, situated east of Bethel, in the northern part of the territory of the tribe of Benjamin, Gen 12:8 13:3 Jos 7:2, seqq.; 8:1 , seq.; Ezr 2:28. LXX. Ἀγγαί. Vulg. Hai. Other forms of the same name which are fem. are עַיָּא Neh 11:31 עַיָּה 1Ch 7:28 [but this is עַזָּה]; and עַיָּת Isa 10:28.
